parameters.query:
UPDATE button_set
SET awaiting_field = 1
WHERE chat_id = '{{ $json.result.chat.id }}'

UPDATE button_set
SET awaiting_field = 2
WHERE chat_id = '{{ $json.result.chat.id }}'

UPDATE button_set
SET awaiting_field = 4
WHERE chat_id = '{{ $json.result.chat.id }}'

UPDATE button_set
SET awaiting_field = 7
WHERE chat_id = '{{ $json.result.chat.id }}'

UPDATE button_set
SET awaiting_field = 8
WHERE chat_id = '{{ $json.result.chat.id }}'

UPDATE button_set
SET awaiting_field = 9
WHERE chat_id = '{{ $json.result.chat.id }}'

SELECT
   -- Флаги покупки
    bybit_buy_flag,
    mexc_buy_flag,
    gate_buy_flag,
    htx_buy_flag,
    -- Флаги продажи
    bybit_sell_flag,
    mexc_sell_flag,
    gate_sell_flag,
    htx_sell_flag,
    htx_buy_flag,
    bingx_buy_flag,
    bingx_sell_flag,
    awaiting_field,
    chat_id
FROM button_set
WHERE chat_id = '{{ $json.targetChatId }}'

SELECT
    chat_id
FROM button_set
WHERE chat_id = '{{ $json.message.chat.id }}'

SELECT
    chat_id
FROM button_set
WHERE chat_id = '{{ $json.message.chat.id }}'

SELECT
    awaiting_field
FROM button_set
WHERE chat_id = '{{ $json.message.chat.id }}'

UPDATE button_set
SET awaiting_field = 3,
    spread_perc = {{ $json.message.text }}
WHERE chat_id = '{{ $json.message.chat.id }}'

UPDATE button_set
SET awaiting_field = 5,
    volume_min = {{ $json.message.text }}
WHERE chat_id = '{{ $json.message.chat.id }}'

UPDATE button_set
SET awaiting_field = 6,
    volume_max = {{ $json.message.text }}
WHERE chat_id = '{{ $json.message.chat.id }}'

UPDATE button_set
SET awaiting_field = 0,
    blacklist_coin = '{{ $json.message.text }}'
WHERE chat_id = '{{ $json.message.chat.id }}'

UPDATE button_set
SET awaiting_field = 0,
    blacklist_chain = '{{ $json.message.text }}'
WHERE chat_id = '{{ $json.message.chat.id }}'

SELECT
    chat_id,
    --
    blacklist_chain,
    blacklist_coin,
    spread_perc,
    volume_min,
    volume_max,
    profit_perc
FROM button_set
WHERE chat_id = '{{ $json.message.chat.id }}'

SELECT
    on_off
FROM button_set
WHERE chat_id = '{{ $json.headers["x-chat-id"] }}'

SELECT
   -- Флаги покупки
    bybit_buy_flag,
    mexc_buy_flag,
    gate_buy_flag,
    -- Флаги продажи
    bybit_sell_flag,
    mexc_sell_flag,
    gate_sell_flag,
    htx_buy_flag,
    htx_sell_flag,
    bingx_buy_flag,
    bingx_sell_flag
FROM button_set
WHERE chat_id = '{{ $json.chat_id }}'

SELECT
   -- Флаги покупки
    bybit_buy_flag,
    mexc_buy_flag,
    gate_buy_flag,
    -- Флаги продажи
    bybit_sell_flag,
    mexc_sell_flag,
    gate_sell_flag,
    htx_buy_flag,
    htx_sell_flag,
    bingx_buy_flag,
    bingx_sell_flag
FROM button_set
WHERE chat_id = '{{ $json.chat_id }}'

UPDATE button_set
SET on_off = 'ON',
    awaiting_field = 0
WHERE chat_id = '{{ $json.result.chat.id }}'

UPDATE button_set
SET awaiting_field = 0,
    profit_perc = '{{ $json.message.text }}'
WHERE chat_id = '{{ $json.message.chat.id }}'

UPDATE button_set
SET on_off = 'OFF'
WHERE chat_id = '{{ $json.result.chat.id }}'

SELECT
   -- Флаги покупки
    bybit_buy_flag,
    mexc_buy_flag,
    gate_buy_flag,
    htx_buy_flag,
    -- Флаги продажи
    bybit_sell_flag,
    mexc_sell_flag,
    gate_sell_flag,
    htx_sell_flag,
    bingx_buy_flag,
    bingx_sell_flag,
  
    awaiting_field,
    blacklist_chain,
    blacklist_coin,
    spread_perc,
    profit_perc,
    volume_min,
    volume_max,
    message_id
FROM button_set
WHERE chat_id = '{{ $json.chat_id_final }}'

SELECT
    chat_id,
    bybit_buy_flag,
    bybit_sell_flag,
    mexc_buy_flag,
    mexc_sell_flag,

    bingx_sell_flag,
